title: hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme is a subspecies of the Hieracium juranum plant, commonly known as Hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic. Hieracium juranum subsp. globulariiforme can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
